recommendations.title: Airplane!
recommendations.overview: An ex-fighter pilot forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning.
recommendations.director: David Zucker, Jerry Zucker, Jim Abrahams

recommendations.title: Jane Austen's Mafia!
recommendations.overview: After growing up poor in Salmonella, Vincenzo Cortino installs himself as the preeminent, if bumbling, Mafia don of the New World. But now he must pass on power to one of his two sons: either level-headed veteran Anthony or vituperative loose cannon

recommendations.title: Big Business
recommendations.overview: In the 1940s in the small town of Jupiter Hollow, two sets of identical twins are born in the same hospital on the same night. One set to a poor local family and the other to a rich family just passing through. The dizzy nurse on duty accidentally mi

recommendations.title: Hot Shots! Part Deux
recommendations.overview: Topper Harley is found to be working as an odd-job-man in a monastery. The CIA want him to lead a rescue mission into Iraq, to rescue the last rescue team, who went in to rescue the last rescue team—who went in to rescue hostages left behind after De

recommendations.title: Top Secret!
recommendations.overview: Popular and dashing American singer Nick Rivers travels to East Germany to perform in a music festival. When he loses his heart to the gorgeous Hillary Flammond, he finds himself caught up in an underground resistance movement. Rivers joins forces wi
recommendations.director: Jerry Zucker, Jim Abrahams, David Zucker

recommendations.title: Hot Shots!
recommendations.overview: The gang that created Airplane! and The Naked Gun sets its sights on Top Gun in this spoof. Topper Harley is a talented but unstable fighter pilot with an axe to grind: clearing the family name. His mission is to avenge his father and save a mission

recommendations.title: Ruthless People
recommendations.overview: Sam Stone hates his wife Barbara so much that he wants her dead. He's ecstatic when she's taken by a duo of kidnappers who want $500,000 ransom in exchange for her life. Fully intending to ignore every one of the kidnappers' demands in the hopes that
recommendations.director: Jim Abrahams, Jerry Zucker, David Zucker

recommendations.title: Gilda
recommendations.overview: A gambler discovers an old flame while in Argentina, but she's married to his new boss.

recommendations.title: The Decoy Bride
recommendations.overview: A local woman is hired to draw paparazzi away from a Hollywood actress who has come to Scotland to get married.

recommendations.title: Young Adult
recommendations.overview: A divorced writer from the Midwest returns to her hometown to reconnect with an old flame, who's now married with a family.
